title: opencryptoki bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.25.0-5.1]
- Fix unwrapping of attribute bound EC keys
- Fix private secure key blob import
  Resolves: RHEL-131645
